product.title: L'Oreal Paris Age Perfect 4-in-1 Tinted Face Balm Foundation with Firming Serum, Medium 10, 0.61 Ounce
featureBullets: 4-in-1 Tinted Balm: Providing the Benefits of a skincare balm plus the coverage of a foundation, this tinted balm offers 4-in-1 benefits: It firms, smooths lines, conceals imperfections, and evens tone

Anti-Aging Formula: This balm with Firming Serum melts into skin to instantly smooth your complexion and minimize imperfections like wrinkles and fine lines while providing comfortable wear throughout the day
Flawless Finish: From matte for oily skin to cream for dry skin and everything in between, find the formula that works with your skin, from long-lasting foundation to tinted moisturizers
Because You're Worth It: Create the look you want with our full line of makeup including foundations, concealers, highlighters, brow pencils, eyeshadow palettes, lipsticks and much more
L'Oreal Paris Beauty: A leading total beauty care company based in Paris, we offer innovative products and unique expertise from beauty experts in makeup, skin care, hair care, styling and hair color
product.description: Skincare-Inspired Formula. Makeup Results plus Anti-Aging Care in 1 Swipe. A Tinted balm with 4-in-1 Benefits - Firms Overtime - Smooths Lines - Conceals Imperfections - Evens Tone. Infused with Firming Serum and 91% of women agree product minimizes imperfections like wrinkles and fine lines. Formula Melts into Skin Instantly & Smooths Complexion. Our Firming Serum Restores Skin Firmness. 100 percent agree skin feels comfortable throughout the day. Available in 8 Light to Medium coverage Blendable Shades ranging from deep to fair.

specification.value: #37,026 in Beauty & Personal Care (See Top 100 in Beauty & Personal Care) #330 in Foundation Makeup

reviewsInfo.customersSay: Customers find this foundation balm provides good coverage while being lightweight and smooth on the skin, with a creamy texture that makes skin look beautiful. The product stays on all day and blends well, with one customer noting it doesn't sink into fine lines or wrinkles. The color match receives mixed feedback, with some customers saying it matches their skin tone perfectly while others find the medium shade too orange.

reviews.reviewText: I am 50 years old with moderately dry skin. I always struggled with foundations because no matter what I’ve tried- they all look cakey & make my face look dry. Not this one! It is absolutely amazing! I have received so many compliments in my skin since switching to this. It makes me look smooth, dewey & glowing. It never soaks into my wrinkles & stays on all day. It also minimizes my redness, covers broken capillaries around my cheeks and nose and gives me a natural looking, even skin tone. I use Light 20 in winter then switch to Medium 10 in summer when I get a tan. It blends great too, even if you don’t match the color perfectly because you use your fingers to apply it, like a moisturizer. I just pray they never discontinue this face balm!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on May 6, 2024

reviews.reviewText: Great coverage. Smooth and it feels great!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 15, 2026

reviews.reviewText: this is a holy grail product for me!! it goes on so smoothly and it gives me a natural glowy look without putting on heavy foundation. i throw this on with primer and blush, and that's all i really need. p.s - it is discontinued officially by the l'oreal company so stock up while you can ladies.

Reviewed in the United States on March 18, 2026

reviews.reviewText: I confess that I bought this after seeing a YouTube influencer recommended it. It really is a great product for aging skin. I’m not sure of the “firming, etc” claims, but is so light and it doesn’t settle into fine lines and wrinkles. Although it’s very light coverage, it’s slightly buildable. It sort of melts into your skin, evening tone, moisturizing and improving texture. Colours run dark, so you need to go lighter than usual. This is my new “daily wear” makeup. It is so natural looking.
love this, gives my 50 something skin a fresh dewy glow.
Do not buy unless you are SURE it is the right colour for you — it’s too orange for me and in order to return it (unopened) I’d have to pay shipping which is more expensive than the item is worth.
This is a nice product, if you color match properly. Super hydration.
